w68_rejection_command: AUDITOOOR_FIXTURE_SMOKE_MODE=1 AUDITOOOR_SLITHER_NOCACHE=1 python3 detectors/run_custom.py --tier=ALL detectors/fixtures/vote_power_self_delegation_double_count/positive.sol w68-vote-double-count-delegation && AUDITOOOR_FIXTURE_SMOKE_MODE=1 AUDITOOOR_SLITHER_NOCACHE=1 python3 detectors/run_custom.py --tier=ALL detectors/fixtures/vote_power_self_delegation_double_count/positive.sol w68-delegation-power-inflation-no-debit
limitation_note: Detector-fixture-smoke-only: proves a stale self-delegate source shape where old delegated votes remain live while the new delegate is credited. A real finding still needs target reachability, voting outcome proof, OOS/dupe checks, and runnable PoC.
